title: Tailoring spontaneous symmetry breaking in engineered van der Waals superlattices
summary: Superlattice engineering in van der Waals heterostructures (e.\,g.\ by moiré engineering) provides a powerful platform for designing electronic bands and realising correlated and topological quantum phenomena. Here, we pioneer a scheme to tailor superpotentials based on intrinsic substrate electronic orders. We show that this establishes a robust, self-aligned, and highly versatile route to band-structure control as we demonstrate in graphene by engineering two distinct, nearly commensurate superlattices using the charge density waves of 1T-NbSe$_2$. In these superlattices the graphene's Dirac cones are folded either to the $Γ$-point or to the K-points of the mini-Brillouin zone. Using scanning tunnelling microscopy, we observe that the $Γ$-folded system preserves C$_3$ symmetry, while the K-folded system exhibits spontaneous symmetry breaking. Combining density functional theory with an interlayer interaction model, we reveal that this difference is not electronically driven but originates from a structural instability. Our work establishes superlattice engineering for designer quantum states and unveils a structural mechanism for controlled emergent symmetry breaking.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种基于本征衬底电子序的超晶格工程新方案，利用1T-NbSe2的电荷密度波在石墨烯中构建了两种不同的超晶格，实现了对狄拉克锥的精确调控和对称性破缺控制。
AI.motivation: 范德华异质结中的超晶格工程（如莫尔工程）是设计电子能带和实现关联拓扑量子现象的有力平台。然而，现有方法通常依赖于外部调控，本研究旨在开发一种基于衬底本征电子序的自对准、稳健的超晶格工程方案。
AI.method: 利用1T-NbSe2的电荷密度波作为本征衬底电子序，在石墨烯上构建两种不同的近公度超晶格。通过扫描隧道显微镜观察对称性特征，结合密度泛函理论和层间相互作用模型分析电子和结构特性。
AI.result: 成功实现了两种超晶格：一种将石墨烯狄拉克锥折叠到Γ点并保持C3对称性，另一种将狄拉克锥折叠到K点并出现自发对称性破缺。研究发现这种对称性破缺差异并非电子驱动，而是源于结构不稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了基于本征衬底电子序的超晶格工程设计量子态的新途径，揭示了结构机制在控制涌现对称性破缺中的关键作用，为量子态设计提供了新思路。

title: Dissipation effects in the Su-Schrieffer-Heeger model coupled to a metallic environment
summary: We theoretically study the electronic and lattice properties of a trans-polyacetylene (tPA) molecule deposited on top of a metallic substrate at equilibrium. We describe the system using a modified Su-Schrieffer-Heeger (SSH) model generalized to incorporate the effects of a metallic environment, represented by independent one-dimensional semi-infinite chains coupled to each site of the SSH chain (i.e., ``local bath approximation"). We focus on the zero-temperature case and obtain the physical properties of an $N$-site tPA chain deposited on a metallic surface by minimizing its total ground-state energy (i.e., electronic plus lattice degrees of freedom) as a function of the $N$ lattice-site positions. Interestingly, in the case of a homogeneous metallic substrate, where all coupling parameters are assumed identical, the SSH chain undergoes a zero-temperature insulator-to-metal transition as the coupling parameter $γ_0$ reaches a critical value where the Peierls dimerization is fully suppressed and the system becomes metallic. In addition, our model can be generalized to describe inhomogeneous situations where the substrate contains metallic and insulating regions, as usually occurs in realistic experiments containing accidentally oxidized decoupling layers. In this case, our results predict the occurrence of local nucleation of the metalized or the Peierls-dimerized phase within the same tPA molecule, depending on whether the surface directly beneath the molecule is metallic or insulating, respectively. We finally discuss the relevance of our findings for both the correct interpretation of existing tPA/Cu(110) experiments, as well as for their possible utility in the design of novel organic nanoelectronic devices.

AI.tldr: 研究沉积在金属基底上的反式聚乙炔分子的电子和晶格性质，发现金属基底耦合会导致零温绝缘体-金属转变，并在不均匀基底上出现局部金属化或Peierls二聚化相
AI.motivation: 理解沉积在金属基底上的有机分子（如反式聚乙炔）的电子和晶格性质，特别是在金属基底影响下的相变行为，这对于解释现有实验和设计新型有机纳米电子器件至关重要
AI.method: 采用改进的Su-Schrieffer-Heeger模型，将金属基底效应纳入考虑（局部浴近似），通过最小化总基态能量（电子加晶格自由度）来研究N个位点的tPA链的物理性质
AI.result: 在均匀金属基底中，当耦合参数达到临界值时，SSH链经历零温绝缘体-金属转变，Peierls二聚化完全被抑制；在不均匀基底上，同一tPA分子内会出现局部金属化或Peierls二聚化相，取决于下方基底的性质
AI.conclusion: 该研究为解释现有tPA/Cu(110)实验提供了理论框架，并为设计新型有机纳米电子器件提供了有用指导，展示了基底性质对有机分子电子态的重要调控作用

title: Flexural Cavity Mechanics in Electrostatically Driven 1D Phononic Crystal
summary: Phononic Crystals provide a versatile platform for controlling phonons in applications such as waveguiding, filtering, and sensing. To minimize dissipation, cavity resonators are often embedded within the bandgap of phononic crystals and integrated with suitable transduction techniques. Here, we demonstrate one-dimensional (1D) phononic transmission using electrostatic transduction, enabling the realization of high-quality mechanical oscillators. Using a double-ended tuning fork resonator embedded in a 1D phononic crystal, we observe degenerate flexural modes (in-phase and out-phase) exhibiting enhanced and comparable quality factors within the same device due to mode degeneracy. The in-phase mode, whose frequency lies inside the phononic bandgap, shows an approximately two-fold increase in quality factor compared to an anchored resonator, while this enhancement diminishes for the out-phase mode (frequency outside the bandgap) at temperatures where thermoelastic dissipation is negligible. This approach offers a promising route toward low-loss, encapsulated phononic devices for sensing and signal processing applications.

AI.tldr: 该论文展示了一种基于静电换能的一维声子晶体传输系统，利用双端音叉谐振器实现了高品质因子的机械振荡器，其中同相模式在声子带隙内表现出约两倍的品质因子提升。
AI.motivation: 声子晶体为控制声子提供了多功能平台，但在应用中需要最小化耗散。通常通过在声子晶体带隙内嵌入腔谐振器并集成合适的换能技术来实现。本研究旨在开发低损耗的封装声子器件，用于传感和信号处理应用。
AI.method: 采用静电换能实现一维声子传输，使用嵌入一维声子晶体中的双端音叉谐振器。通过测量简并的弯曲模式（同相和异相）来研究品质因子增强效应，特别关注模式简并和声子带隙对耗散的影响。
AI.result: 观察到简并弯曲模式在相同器件中表现出增强且可比较的品质因子。同相模式（频率在声子带隙内）的品质因子比锚定谐振器提高约两倍，而异相模式（频率在带隙外）在热弹性耗散可忽略的温度下增强效果减弱。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为实现低损耗、封装的声子器件提供了有前景的途径，适用于传感和信号处理应用。通过利用声子带隙和模式简并，可以有效控制机械振荡器的耗散特性。

title: 3D tomography of exchange phase in a Si/SiGe quantum dot device
summary: The exchange interaction is a foundational building block for the operation of spin-based quantum processors. Extracting the exchange interaction coefficient $J(\mathbf{V})$, as a function of gate electrode voltages, is important for understanding disorder, faithfully simulating device performance, and operating spin qubits with high fidelity. Typical coherent measurements of exchange in spin qubit devices yield a modulated cosine of an accumulated phase, which in turn is the time integral of exchange. As such, extracting $J(\mathbf{V})$ from experimental data is difficult due to the ambiguity of inverting a cosine, the sensitivity to noise when unwrapping phase, as well as the problem of inverting the integral. As a step toward obtaining $J(\mathbf{V})$, we tackle the first two challenges to reveal the accumulated phase, $φ(\mathbf{V})$. We incorporate techniques from a wide range of fields to robustly extract and model a 3D phase volume for spin qubit devices from a sequence of 2D measurements. In particular, we present a measurement technique to obtain the wrapped phase, as done in phase-shifting digital holography, and utilize the max-flow/min-cut phase unwrapping method (PUMA) to unwrap the phase in 3D voltage space. We show this method is robust to the minimal observed drift in the device, which we confirm by increasing scan resolution. Upon building a model of the extracted phase, we optimize over the model to locate a minimal-gradient $π$ exchange pulse point in voltage space. Our measurement protocol may provide detailed information useful for understanding the origins of device variability governing device yield, enable calibrating device models to specific devices during operation for more sophisticated error attribution, and enable a systematic optimization of qubit control. We anticipate that the methods presented here may be applicable to other qubit platforms.

AI.tldr: 提出一种从自旋量子比特器件中稳健提取交换相互作用相位信息的方法，解决相位反演和噪声敏感性问题
AI.motivation: 交换相互作用是自旋量子处理器的基础构建块，但传统测量方法难以从实验数据中准确提取交换相互作用系数J(V)，主要面临余弦反演的模糊性、相位展开对噪声的敏感性以及积分反演问题
AI.method: 结合多领域技术：1) 采用类似相移数字全息术的方法获取包裹相位；2) 使用最大流/最小割相位展开方法(PUMA)在3D电压空间中展开相位；3) 建立相位模型并优化寻找最小梯度π交换脉冲点
AI.result: 成功提取并建模了自旋量子比特器件的3D相位体积，方法对器件微小漂移具有鲁棒性，通过提高扫描分辨率验证了这一点，能够定位电压空间中的最小梯度π交换脉冲点
AI.conclusion: 该方法为理解器件变异性的起源、在操作期间校准特定器件模型以实现更复杂的误差归因、以及系统优化量子比特控制提供了详细信息，预计可应用于其他量子比特平台

title: Taming the expressiveness of neural-network wave functions for robust convergence to quantum many-body states
summary: Neural networks are emerging as a powerful tool for determining the quantum states of interacting many-body fermionic systems. The standard approach trains a neural-network ansatz by minimizing the mean local energy estimated from Monte Carlo samples. However, this typically results in large sample-to-sample fluctuations in the estimated mean energy and thus slow convergence of the energy minimization. We propose that minimizing a logarithmically compressed variance of the local energies can dramatically improve convergence. Moreover, this loss function can be adapted to systematically obtain the energy spectrum across multiple runs. We demonstrate these ideas for spin-1/2 particles in a 2D harmonic trap with attractive Poschl-Teller interactions between opposite spins.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于对数压缩方差最小化的神经网络方法，用于改进量子多体费米子系统的能量收敛性和能谱计算
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络方法通过最小化平均局域能量来训练量子态，但存在样本间波动大、能量收敛慢的问题，需要更有效的优化策略
AI.method: 提出最小化局域能量的对数压缩方差作为损失函数，可显著改善收敛速度，并可扩展到多轮运行中系统性地获取能谱
AI.result: 在具有吸引性Poschl-Teller相互作用的二维谐振子势阱中的自旋1/2粒子系统中验证了方法的有效性
AI.conclusion: 对数压缩方差最小化方法能显著改进量子多体费米子系统神经网络训练的收敛性，并为系统性能谱计算提供了新途径

title: A unified variational framework for phase-field fracture and third-medium contact in finite deformation hyperelasticity
summary: This paper presents a unified variational framework that integrates phase-field fracture (PFF) and third-medium contact (TMC) within finite deformation hyperelasticity. The key idea is that both crack and contact are treated through regularization: the sharp crack topology is regularized into a diffuse damage field, while the discrete contact interface is regularized by a compliant fictitious medium with auxiliary fields. This strategy eliminates the need for explicit contact detection or crack tracking algorithms. The framework is validated through two-dimensional three-point bending and three-dimensional Brazilian disk test simulations, demonstrating the interplay between contact-induced stress concentration and crack nucleation/propagation. In particular, the Brazilian disk simulation naturally reproduces secondary crushing-type fracture zones near the contact regions -- a phenomenon consistently observed in experiments yet inaccessible to simplified loading models. These results pave the way for predictive simulation of coupled contact-fracture phenomena without recourse to explicit interface tracking.

AI.tldr: 提出统一变分框架，将相场断裂与第三介质接触整合到有限变形超弹性中，通过正则化处理裂纹和接触，无需显式界面追踪。
AI.motivation: 传统方法需要显式的裂纹追踪和接触检测算法，处理接触-断裂耦合现象复杂且计算成本高。需要一种统一框架来同时处理这两种界面不连续问题。
AI.method: 采用正则化策略：将尖锐裂纹拓扑正则化为扩散损伤场，将离散接触界面正则化为具有辅助场的柔性虚构介质。在有限变形超弹性框架下统一处理相场断裂和第三介质接触。
AI.result: 通过二维三点弯曲和三维巴西圆盘试验模拟验证了框架的有效性，成功再现了接触区域附近的二次压碎型断裂带，这一现象在实验中常见但简化加载模型无法捕捉。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为预测接触-断裂耦合现象提供了有效途径，无需显式界面追踪，能够自然捕捉实验观察到的复杂断裂模式。

title: V2Rho-FNO: Fourier Neural Operator for Electronic Density Prediction
summary: Density functional theory (DFT) is a cornerstone of computational chemistry and materials science, but its computational cost limits its use in large-scale and high-throughput applications. While machine learning has accelerated energy prediction for specific molecular classes, transferable prediction of electron density across diverse chemical spaces remains challenging. Here, we present a universal framework based on Fourier Neural Operators (FNOs) that directly learns the mapping from external potentials to electron density distributions. Unlike conventional approaches that rely on explicit atomic orbitals, basis sets, or handcrafted descriptors, the proposed method captures global electronic interactions and long-range correlations through operator learning in the spatial-frequency domain. Trained on datasets spanning multiple elements and molecular geometries, the model achieves zero-shot generalization to entirely unseen molecular systems and accurately predicts their electron densities without retraining. This transferability arises from the intrinsic ability of FNOs to represent global structure in continuous fields. Our work establishes neural operator learning as a promising route for fast, accurate, and transferable electronic structure prediction, with potential applications in high-throughput screening and chemical space exploration.

AI.tldr: 基于傅里叶神经算子的通用框架，直接从外部势能映射到电子密度分布，实现跨化学空间的零样本泛化预测
AI.motivation: 密度泛函理论计算成本高，限制了大规模应用；现有机器学习方法难以实现跨不同化学空间的电子密度可迁移预测
AI.method: 使用傅里叶神经算子直接学习外部势能到电子密度分布的映射，在空间频率域进行算子学习，捕捉全局电子相互作用和长程关联
AI.result: 模型在跨多个元素和分子几何的数据集上训练后，能够对完全未见过的分子系统实现零样本泛化，准确预测其电子密度
AI.conclusion: 神经算子学习为快速、准确、可迁移的电子结构预测提供了有前景的途径，在高效筛选和化学空间探索中具有应用潜力

title: AC Fingerprints of 2D Electron Hydrodynamics: Superdiffusion and Drude Weight Suppression
summary: Clean two-dimensional Fermi liquids are now known to exhibit an intermediate tomographic regime, between ballistic and Navier--Stokes transport, caused by the anomalously slow relaxation of parity-odd multipolar deformations of the Fermi surface. Here we show that this anomaly extends to the dynamical realm. Starting from a microscopic numerical evaluation of the linearized electron--electron collision operator, we find that the finite-frequency nonlocal conductivity is controlled at low frequency by a single hydrodynamic pole, $σ(q,ω)=\mathcal{D}(q)/(iω+η_\star q^z)$, with dynamical exponent $z=4/3$ and superdiffusive viscosity $η_\star$. Remarkably, the pole residue itself is scale dependent and obeys $\mathcal{D}(q)\sim q^{-α}$ with $α=1/3$, so the dynamical properties are described by two separate exponents rather than one. We interpret the residue suppression using a Krylov-chain description of current relaxation: as $q$ increases, the longest-lived quasinormal mode ceases to be a nearly pure current excitation and spreads over higher odd angular harmonics. Finally, we show that AC transport in narrow channels provides a direct route to measuring the exponents $z$ and $α$ separately.

AI.tldr: 二维费米液体在弹道和Navier-Stokes输运之间存在中间层析区域，由费米面奇宇称多极形变的异常慢弛豫引起，该异常延伸到动力学领域，表现为具有z=4/3和α=1/3两个独立指数的超扩散输运。
AI.motivation: 研究二维费米液体中奇宇称多极形变异常慢弛豫现象如何延伸到动力学领域，探索其有限频率非局域电导率的特征行为。
AI.method: 从微观数值计算线性化电子-电子碰撞算符出发，分析低频率下非局域电导率的流体力学极点结构，使用Krylov链描述电流弛豫过程。
AI.result: 发现有限频率非局域电导率由单个流体力学极点控制：σ(q,ω)=D(q)/(iω+η_*q^z)，其中动力学指数z=4/3，极点残差D(q)~q^{-α}，α=1/3，表明动力学性质由两个独立指数描述。
AI.conclusion: 二维费米液体的异常输运行为延伸到动力学领域，表现为具有两个独立指数的超扩散输运，窄通道中的交流输运为测量这些指数提供了直接途径。

title: Production of Low-Density Aerogel Nuclear Fuels for Use in Fission Fragment Rockets and Novel Reactor Design
summary: Graphene hydrogels were created and loaded with uranyl nitrate or thorium nitrate and freeze-dried to produce graphene aerogel nuclear fuels. These aerogels had densities between 0.018-0.035 g/cm3 and consisted of ~7.3 +- 0.5% uranium/thorium by mass. The ultra-low density of the aerogels allows for high energy ions to escape the fuel particles without depositing all their energy as heat, as is typical in nuclear fuels. Their measured alpha activity was ~16 pCi/mg, which could be enhanced up to ~49 pCi/mg by decreasing the thickness of aerogel samples to allow all alpha particles to escape. Additionally, high energy neutrons were used to induce fission to provide a source of fission fragments from the aerogel fuels. This novel form of nuclear fuel has potential applications in space propulsion such as fission fragment rocket engines, as well as in terrestrial applications for modular reactors, direct conversion methods, and in medical radiotherapeutics.

AI.tldr: 研究人员开发了石墨烯气凝胶核燃料，通过将铀/钍硝酸盐负载到石墨烯水凝胶中并冷冻干燥制成，具有超低密度（0.018-0.035 g/cm³），允许高能粒子逃逸而不完全转化为热能。
AI.motivation: 传统核燃料中高能粒子会将能量沉积为热能，限制了能量利用效率。需要开发新型燃料形式，使高能粒子能够逃逸，从而提高能量转换效率，适用于空间推进和特殊应用。
AI.method: 将铀/钍硝酸盐负载到石墨烯水凝胶中，通过冷冻干燥制成石墨烯气凝胶核燃料。测量其α活性和密度，并使用高能中子诱导裂变产生裂变碎片。
AI.result: 制备的石墨烯气凝胶密度为0.018-0.035 g/cm³，含约7.3±0.5%铀/钍质量分数。α活性约为16 pCi/mg，通过减薄样品厚度可提升至49 pCi/mg。成功诱导裂变产生裂变碎片。
AI.conclusion: 这种新型超低密度核燃料允许高能粒子逃逸，提高能量利用效率，在裂变碎片火箭发动机、模块化反应堆、直接能量转换和医疗放射治疗等领域具有应用潜力。

title: Survival probability of random networks
summary: In this work we study in detail all phases of the time evolution of a delta-like excitation in Erdös-Renyi (ER) random networks by means of the survival probability (SP): The initial decay of the SP (both, the fast decay followed by the power-law decay), the correlation hole regime (the regime between the minimum value of the SP and its saturation value), and the saturation of the SP. Specifically, we found that (i) the power-law decay of the SP and the time-averaged SP are proportional to $t^{-D_{2}}$ and $t^{-\widetilde{D}_{2}}$, respectively (where $D_2$ and $\widetilde{D}_2$ are the correlation dimension of the eigenstates of the randomly weighted adjacency matrices of the ER random networks and the correlation dimension associated with the initial state, respectively) and (ii) the relative depth of the correlation hole of the SP scales with the average degree $\langle k\rangle\approx np$ (here, $n$ and $p$ are the size and the connection probability of the ER random networks). In addition, we show that the eigenstates of the randomly weighted adjacency matrices of ER networks display clear multifractal properties.

AI.tldr: 研究Erdös-Renyi随机网络中delta激发的时间演化，分析生存概率的各个阶段：初始衰减、幂律衰减、相关孔区域和饱和行为
AI.motivation: 深入理解随机网络中量子动力学行为，特别是生存概率在不同时间尺度上的演化特征，探索网络结构与动力学行为之间的关系
AI.method: 通过生存概率分析Erdös-Renyi随机网络中delta激发的时间演化，研究随机加权邻接矩阵的特征态，使用相关维度和平均度等统计量
AI.result: 发现生存概率的幂律衰减与t^{-D_2}成正比，时间平均生存概率与t^{-widetilde{D}_2}成正比；相关孔的相对深度与平均度⟨k⟩≈np成比例；ER网络的随机加权邻接矩阵特征态显示明显的多重分形特性
AI.conclusion: Erdös-Renyi随机网络中量子动力学行为具有丰富的统计特性，生存概率的不同演化阶段与网络结构参数密切相关，特征态的多重分形性质进一步揭示了随机网络的复杂动力学行为

title: Summary overview of present state of basic electrostatic field electron emission theory
summary: This technical note provides a high-level overview of the present state of basic field electron emission (FE) theory, as suitable for use in the context of technological applications of FE theory. At present there is much theoretical confusion in FE literature, and a partial breakdown of the peer review system. Even in sensitive technological contexts, many papers have stated and used out-of-date theory that makes current-density predictions that are several hundred times less than those of modern FE theory. A primary aim of this note is to help reduce the confusion and error in future published FE literature. It is not intended as a detailed review of FE theory.

AI.tldr: 本文概述了当前场致电子发射理论的基本现状，指出该领域存在理论混乱和同行评审系统部分失效的问题，旨在帮助减少未来文献中的错误。
AI.motivation: 当前场致电子发射理论文献中存在大量理论混乱，许多论文仍在使用过时的理论，导致电流密度预测值比现代理论低数百倍，即使在敏感的技术应用背景下也存在这一问题。同行评审系统出现部分失效，需要澄清理论现状以减少未来文献中的错误。
AI.method: 本文采用技术说明的形式，提供场致电子发射理论现状的高层次概述，而非详细的理论综述。重点澄清现代理论与过时理论之间的差异，帮助研究人员正确应用理论。
AI.result: 通过概述当前场致电子发射理论的基本状态，指出了文献中普遍存在的理论混淆问题，特别是过时理论导致的电流密度预测严重偏差（相差数百倍）。
AI.conclusion: 场致电子发射领域存在严重的理论混乱和同行评审问题，需要澄清理论现状以指导技术应用。本文旨在帮助减少未来文献中的错误，促进正确理论的应用。

title: Stoichiometric FeTe is a Superconductor
comment: 39 pages, 4 main figures, and 10 extended data figures. Accepted by Nature. Comments are very welcome
summary: Iron-based superconductors are a fascinating family of materials in which multiple electronic bands and strong antiferromagnetic (AFM) correlations are key ingredients for competing ground states, including antiferromagnetism, electronic nematicity, and unconventional superconductivity. FeTe, unlike its superconducting isostructural counterpart FeSe, has long been regarded as an AFM metal sans superconductivity. In this work, we employ molecular beam epitaxy to grow FeTe films and perform post-growth annealing under a Te flux. By performing spin-polarized scanning tunneling microscopy and spectroscopy, we demonstrate that the AFM order in as-grown FeTe films is induced by interstitial Fe atoms that disrupt the ideal 1:1 stoichiometry. Remarkably, the removal of these interstitial Fe atoms through Te annealing yields stoichiometric FeTe films that show no AFM order and instead exhibit robust superconductivity with a critical temperature of ~13.5K. This superconducting state is further confirmed by the observation of Cooper pair tunneling, zero electrical resistance, and the Meissner effect. Therefore, our results demonstrate that stoichiometric FeTe is inherently a superconductor, overturning a long-held view that it is an AFM metal. This work clarifies the origin of superconductivity in FeTe-based heterostructures and demonstrates the importance of stoichiometry control in understanding the competition between AFM and superconductivity in iron-based superconductors.

AI.tldr: 通过Te退火去除间隙Fe原子，使FeTe薄膜恢复理想化学计量比，从而从反铁磁金属转变为超导体（Tc~13.5K），颠覆了FeTe是反铁磁金属的传统认知。
AI.motivation: FeTe长期以来被认为是反铁磁金属而非超导体，与其同构的FeSe却具有超导性。研究旨在澄清FeTe的本征性质，探索化学计量比对反铁磁与超导竞争关系的影响。
AI.method: 采用分子束外延生长FeTe薄膜，在Te气氛下进行后生长退火处理。利用自旋极化扫描隧道显微镜和光谱学表征反铁磁序，通过电输运和磁测量验证超导性。
AI.result: 间隙Fe原子破坏了FeTe的理想1:1化学计量比，诱导反铁磁序。去除这些间隙原子后，获得化学计量比的FeTe薄膜表现出无反铁磁序，而是具有~13.5K临界温度的稳健超导性，并通过库珀对隧穿、零电阻和迈斯纳效应证实。
AI.conclusion: 化学计量比的FeTe本质上是超导体而非反铁磁金属，这一发现颠覆了长期以来的认知，阐明了FeTe基异质结构中超导性的起源，强调了化学计量控制在理解铁基超导体中反铁磁与超导竞争关系的重要性。

title: Tuning Cu/Diamond Interfacial Thermal Conductance via Nitrogen-Termination Engineering
summary: Cu-diamond composites are recognized as promising high-thermal-conductivity candidates for electronic cooling, offering tunable properties and competitive cost. However, their performance is significantly limited by the poor Cu/diamond interfacial thermal conductance (ITC). Here, we propose a nitrogen-termination strategy to tune the ITC of Cu/diamond interfaces and unravel atomistic mechanisms by which nitride interlayers tailor phonon transport. Based on the MACE machine-learning interatomic potential (MLIP) framework, we fine-tune the pre-trained MACE-MPA-0 foundation model by incorporating customized C-N-Cu training datasets. Through MLIP-driven lattice dynamics simulations, we demonstrate that an atomically flat N-termination on diamond enhances the ITC by 21% compared to the bare Cu/diamond interface. Mode-resolved phonon spectroscopy reveals that the LA phonons with frequency above 4 THz and wavevectors near Γ-X and Γ-U directions are selectively modulated by N-termination engineering. Analyses of local vibrational states and interfacial bonding further indicate that the N-termination on diamond tunes the interfacial heat conduction via surficial mass modification and bonding regulation, as evidenced by variations in LDOS overlap and COHP spectra. These findings open venues for tuning heat transfer across Cu/diamond interfaces via non-metallic modification, which avoids the graphitization issues associated with metallic coatings, and provide novel guidelines for upgrading the phonon-mediated heat transfer in Cu-diamond composites.

AI.tldr: 提出氮终止策略提升Cu/金刚石界面热导，通过机器学习势函数模拟揭示氮层调控声子传输的原子机制，界面热导提升21%。
AI.motivation: Cu-金刚石复合材料是电子冷却领域有前景的高导热材料，但其性能受限于Cu/金刚石界面热导率低的问题。传统金属涂层会导致石墨化问题，需要寻找非金属改性方法。
AI.method: 基于MACE机器学习势函数框架，微调预训练的MACE-MPA-0基础模型，加入定制的C-N-Cu训练数据集。通过MLIP驱动的晶格动力学模拟，研究金刚石表面氮终止对界面热导的影响，并进行模式分辨的声子光谱分析。
AI.result: 金刚石表面原子级平坦的氮终止使Cu/金刚石界面热导率比裸界面提升21%。声子光谱分析显示，频率高于4 THz的LA声子以及Γ-X和Γ-U方向附近的波矢被氮终止工程选择性调控。局域振动态和界面键合分析表明，氮终止通过表面质量改性和键合调控来调节界面热传导。
AI.conclusion: 氮终止策略为调控Cu/金刚石界面热传输提供了新途径，避免了金属涂层相关的石墨化问题，为提升Cu-金刚石复合材料中声子介导的热传输提供了新指导原则。

title: Life cycle assessment for all organic chemicals
summary: Chemicals are embedded in nearly every aspect of modern society, yet their production poses substantial sustainability concerns. Achieving a sustainable chemical industry requires detailed Life Cycle Assessment (LCA); however, current assessments face many unknowns due to limited, partly inconsistent, and untransparent data coverage since existing Life Cycle Inventory (LCI) databases account for only a tiny fraction of traded chemicals. Here, we introduce the Chemical RetrosYnthesiS for Transparent Assessment of Life-cycles (CRYSTAL) framework, which automatically generates consistent and transparent LCI data for organic chemicals based on their molecular structure using retrosynthesis and machine-learned gate-to-gate inventories. Using the predictive power of CRYSTAL, we create a consistent database for more than 70000 organic chemicals, comprising over 110000 transparent LCI datasets that quantify both feedstock and energy demands, together with associated auxiliary materials, biosphere flows, and waste flows. From this comprehensive database, we identify 50 key environmental hotspots driving high impacts of organic chemical production across multiple environmental categories and pivotal hub chemicals that are most critical for downstream chemical production. In providing this comprehensive data foundation, the CRYSTAL framework offers systematic guidance for targeted engineering and policy interventions. Its transparent, modular nature is designed to shift chemical LCA from a reliance on "unknown unknowns" to a collaboratively improvable mapping of "known unknowns".

AI.tldr: CRYSTAL框架通过逆合成和机器学习自动生成有机化学品透明生命周期清单数据，创建了包含7万多种化学品、11万多个数据集的数据库，识别了环境热点和关键枢纽化学品。
AI.motivation: 化学品生产存在严重可持续性问题，但现有生命周期评估面临数据不足、不一致、不透明的挑战，现有数据库仅覆盖少量化学品。
AI.method: 基于分子结构，结合逆合成分析和机器学习门到门清单，自动生成一致透明的生命周期清单数据。
AI.result: 创建了包含70000多种有机化学品、110000多个透明LCI数据集的数据库，识别了50个关键环境热点和最重要的下游生产枢纽化学品。
AI.conclusion: CRYSTAL框架为化学品生命周期评估提供了系统数据基础，将评估从"未知的未知"转变为可协作改进的"已知的未知"映射。

title: Neural-Network Quantum Embedding Solvers for Correlated Materials
summary: Quantum impurity solvers are the computational bottleneck of quantum embedding approaches to correlated materials, such as dynamical mean-field theory (DMFT). We show that neural networks trained on synthetic, material-agnostic data learn the impurity mapping from hybridization functions and local interactions to Green's functions with quantitative accuracy for both model systems and real materials, providing fast solvers for single- and multi-orbital models. Benchmarks against numerically controlled quantum Monte Carlo show that the method reproduces the Mott transition, multi-orbital phase diagrams of Hubbard-Kanamori models, and the electronic properties of SrVO$_3$ and SrMnO$_3$. The learned solvers achieve orders-of-magnitude speedup and can initialize controlled calculations, dramatically accelerating DMFT while preserving accuracy.

AI.tldr: 神经网络通过合成数据学习杂质映射，实现量子杂质求解器的数量级加速，在保持精度的同时显著提升DMFT计算效率
AI.motivation: 量子杂质求解器是量子嵌入方法（如DMFT）的计算瓶颈，需要开发快速且准确的求解器来加速材料计算
AI.method: 使用在合成、材料无关数据上训练的神经网络，学习从杂化函数和局域相互作用到格林函数的杂质映射，适用于单轨道和多轨道模型
AI.result: 神经网络求解器能够定量再现Mott相变、Hubbard-Kanamori模型的多轨道相图，以及SrVO₃和SrMnO₃的电子性质，相比量子蒙特卡洛方法实现数量级加速
AI.conclusion: 学习的求解器在保持精度的同时实现数量级加速，能够初始化受控计算，显著加速DMFT计算流程

title: LLM-Driven Discovery of High-Entropy Catalysts via Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: CO2 reduction requires efficient catalysts, yet materials discovery remains bottlenecked by 10-20 year development cycles requiring deep domain expertise. This paper demonstrates how large language models can assist the catalyst discovery process by helping researchers explore chemical spaces and interpret results when augmented with retrieval-based grounding. We introduce a retrieval-augmented generation framework that enables GPT-4 to navigate chemical space by accessing a database of 50,000+ known materials, adapting general-purpose language understanding for high-throughput materials design. Our approach generated over 250 catalyst candidates with an 82% thermodynamic stability rate while addressing multi-objective constraints: 68% achieved <$100/kg cost with metallic conductivity (band gap<0.1eV) and mechanical stability (B/G>1.75). The best-performing Fe0.2Co0.2Ni0.2Ir0.1Ru0.3 achieves 0.285V limiting potential (25% improvement over IrO2), while Cr0.2Fe0.2Co0.3Ni0.2Mo0.1 optimally balances performance-cost trade-offs at $18/kg. Volcano plot analysis confirms that 78% of LLM-generated catalysts cluster near the theoretical activity optimum, while our system achieves 200x computational efficiency compared to traditional high-throughput screening. By demonstrating that retrieval-augmented generation can ground AI creativity in physical constraints without sacrificing exploration, this work demonstrates an approach where natural language interfaces can streamline materials discovery workflows, enabling researchers to explore chemical spaces more efficiently while the LLM assists in result interpretation and hypothesis generation.

AI.tldr: 利用检索增强生成框架，让GPT-4能够访问5万+已知材料数据库，高效探索化学空间并生成催化剂候选材料，在CO2还原催化剂发现中实现82%热力学稳定性和显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: CO2还原需要高效催化剂，但传统材料发现周期长达10-20年且需要深厚领域专业知识，成为瓶颈。需要开发新方法来加速催化剂发现过程。
AI.method: 提出检索增强生成框架，让GPT-4能够访问包含5万+已知材料的数据库，将通用语言理解能力应用于高通量材料设计。系统通过自然语言界面帮助研究人员探索化学空间并解释结果。
AI.result: 生成超过250个催化剂候选材料，82%具有热力学稳定性；68%满足<100美元/公斤成本、金属导电性（带隙<0.1eV）和机械稳定性（B/G>1.75）等多目标约束。最佳催化剂Fe0.2Co0.2Ni0.2Ir0.1Ru0.3的极限电位为0.285V（比IrO2提升25%），Cr0.2Fe0.2Co0.3Ni0.2Mo0.1以18美元/公斤成本实现性能-成本最优平衡。火山图分析显示78%的LLM生成催化剂接近理论活性最优值，计算效率比传统高通量筛选高200倍。
AI.conclusion: 检索增强生成能够将AI创造力与物理约束相结合而不牺牲探索能力，自然语言界面可以简化材料发现工作流程，使研究人员能够更高效地探索化学空间，同时LLM协助结果解释和假设生成。

title: Non-Thermal Aging of Supercooled Liquids in Optical Cavities
summary: Aging is a hallmark of disordered materials such as glasses, plastics, and pharmaceuticals, where it often limits long-term stability and performance. In practice, aging is controlled through global parameters like temperature or pressure, which act uniformly on the entire system. Here we introduce a fundamentally different approach, using light confined in optical cavities as a precise and selective tool to guide aging dynamics. We show that a supercooled liquid coupled to an optical cavity undergoes non-thermal aging, where aging is induced by light without a thermal quench. Light selectively pumps fast vibrational modes while the bath temperature remains unchanged, reshaping the slow structural dynamics of the liquid. The cavity-coupled liquid thereby behaves as if it were structurally colder than its surroundings. Exploiting this effective structural cooling together with the timescale separation, we introduce cavity configurational feedback ($\mathrm{C^2F}$) cooling, which uses cavity coupling to reach progressively lower structural temperatures. Our results establish a connection between glass physics and strong light-matter interactions and open a new route toward optical control of aging, glass formation, and nonequilibrium materials dynamics.

AI.tldr: 利用光学腔中的光作为精确选择性工具控制老化动力学，实现非热老化，通过腔构型反馈冷却达到更低结构温度
AI.motivation: 传统老化控制方法（如温度、压力）对整个系统均匀作用，需要更精确、选择性的工具来指导老化动力学，特别是在无序材料中
AI.method: 将过冷液体与光学腔耦合，利用光选择性地泵浦快速振动模式而不改变浴温度，重塑液体的慢结构动力学，引入腔构型反馈冷却技术
AI.result: 腔耦合液体表现出非热老化行为，其结构表现比周围环境更冷，通过腔构型反馈冷却可达到渐进降低的结构温度
AI.conclusion: 建立了玻璃物理学与强光-物质相互作用之间的联系，为光学控制老化、玻璃形成和非平衡材料动力学开辟了新途径

title: Magnetoresistance ratio of a point-like contact with a 1 nm wide domain wall at different MFP asymmetries
summary: This work presents a unified theoretical framework for spin-resolved electron transport in magnetic point contacts (PCs) in nanoscale dimensions. This work advances existing research by presenting a model which seamlessly transitions between Sharvin ballistic and Maxwell-Holm diffusive limits across the wide range of relevant contact sizes without incorporating empirical fitting factors. We analyzed the magnetoresistance (MR) of magnetic PCs formed with two ferromagnetic monodomains that may have parallel and antiparallel magnetization alignment, forming a constrained domain wall approximately 1.0 nm wide. The calculated MR exhibits strong dependence on scaling parameter (normalized contact radius), ratios of spin-dependent mean free paths, and Fermi wave-vectors. Furthermore, the calculated MR exhibits physically meaningful behavior over a wide range of spin-asymmetry parameters. In most regimes, the MR decreases with increasing normalized point-contact radius, becoming negative at some conditions. These results demonstrate that nanoscaled magnetic PCs have great efficiency in terms of magnetoresistnace change and promising for application due to their simplicity.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一个统一的理论框架，用于分析纳米尺度磁性点接触中的自旋分辨电子输运，模型可在Sharvin弹道极限和Maxwell-Holm扩散极限之间无缝过渡，无需经验拟合参数。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏能够统一描述纳米尺度磁性点接触中电子输运行为的理论框架，特别是在不同接触尺寸下弹道和扩散输运机制之间的过渡。需要建立一个无需经验拟合参数的理论模型来准确预测磁电阻效应。
AI.method: 提出了一个统一的理论框架，模型能够无缝过渡于Sharvin弹道极限和Maxwell-Holm扩散极限之间，分析两个铁磁单畴形成的磁性点接触（约1.0纳米宽约束畴壁），考虑平行和反平行磁化排列，计算磁电阻随标度参数（归一化接触半径）、自旋相关平均自由程比和费米波矢的变化。
AI.result: 计算的磁电阻显示出对归一化接触半径、自旋相关平均自由程比和费米波矢的强烈依赖性。在大多数情况下，磁电阻随归一化点接触半径增加而减小，在某些条件下变为负值。模型在宽范围的自旋不对称参数下表现出物理意义明确的行为。
AI.conclusion: 纳米尺度磁性点接触在磁电阻变化方面具有高效率，且由于其结构简单，在应用方面具有良好前景。该统一理论框架为理解和设计纳米磁电子器件提供了重要工具。

title: Pressure and strain tuning of the alternating bilayer-trilayer Ruddlesden-Popper nickelate: crystal and electronic structure
summary: We use first-principles calculations to investigate the crystal and electronic structure of the hybrid bilayer-trilayer Ruddlesden-Popper (RP) nickelate La$_7$Ni$_5$O$_{17}$ under hydrostatic pressure and biaxial compressive strain. By analyzing the irreducible representations of the dynamically unstable phonon modes in the high-symmetry $P4/mmm$ structure, we identify a dynamically stable lower-symmetry $C2/c$ structure containing octahedral tilts. The application of both pressure and compressive strain tends to suppress the octahedral tilts, effectively tetragonalizing the structure, in analogy with the conventional RPs. The electronic structure under hydrostatic pressure and strain has similarities, but it differs in the position of the $d_{z^2}$ bonding band from the trilayer block. This band crosses the Fermi level at a pressure of 30 GPa, but it remains below it for any level of compressive strain. This strain-induced modification mirrors the electronic structure changes observed in the conventional bilayer nickelate.

AI.tldr: 通过第一性原理计算研究混合双层-三层RP镍酸盐La7Ni5O17在静水压和双轴压缩应变下的晶体与电子结构，发现压力使dz2键合带穿过费米能级而应变则不能。
AI.motivation: 研究混合双层-三层Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐La7Ni5O17在压力/应变下的结构演化与电子性质变化，理解其与传统RP材料的异同。
AI.method: 使用第一性原理计算分析高对称性P4/mmm结构中动态不稳定声子模式，通过不可约表示分析确定稳定的低对称性C2/c结构，研究静水压和双轴压缩应变对结构八面体倾斜和电子结构的影响。
AI.result: 压力(30 GPa)和应变都会抑制八面体倾斜使结构四方化，但电子结构差异显著：压力使三层块的dz2键合带穿过费米能级，而任何程度的应变都使其保持在费米能级以下，这与传统双层镍酸盐的应变诱导电子结构变化相似。
AI.conclusion: 混合双层-三层RP镍酸盐La7Ni5O17在压力/应变下表现出与传统RP材料类似的结构四方化趋势，但电子响应存在重要差异：压力能诱导dz2键合带穿过费米能级，而应变则不能，这为调控其电子性质提供了不同途径。

title: Sub-cell Wave Reconstruction from Differentiated Riemann Variables
summary: We introduce a postprocessing procedure that recovers sub-cell wave geometry from a standard one-dimensional Euler shock-capturing computation using differentiated Riemann variables (DRVs) -- characteristic derivatives that separate the three wave families into distinct localized spikes. Filtered DRV surrogates detect the waves, plateau sampling extracts the local states, and a pressure-wave-function Newton closure completes the geometry. The entire pipeline adds less than $0.25\%$ to the cost of a baseline WENO--5/HLLC solve. For Sod, a severe-expansion problem, and the LeBlanc shock tube, wave locations are recovered to within roundoff or $O(10^{-4})$ and the contact is sharpened to one cell width; a pattern-agnostic extension handles all four Riemann configurations with errors at the $10^{-6}$--$10^{-8}$ level. Direct comparison with MUSCL--THINC--BVD and WENO-Z--THINC--BVD shows that neither reproduces the combination of sharp contacts, small contact-window internal-energy error, and elimination of the LeBlanc positive overshoot achieved by the DRV reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 提出一种后处理流程，从标准一维欧拉激波捕捉计算中恢复亚网格波几何结构，使用微分黎曼变量分离三种波族，成本仅增加基线计算的0.25%
AI.motivation: 传统激波捕捉方法在捕捉接触间断时存在精度不足和数值耗散问题，需要一种能准确恢复波几何结构且成本低廉的后处理方法
AI.method: 使用微分黎曼变量分离三种波族，通过滤波DRV代理检测波，平台采样提取局部状态，压力波函数牛顿闭包完成几何重建
AI.result: 波位置恢复精度达到舍入误差或O(10^-4)级别，接触间断锐化至一个网格宽度，相比MUSCL-THINC-BVD和WENO-Z-THINC-BVD方法在接触锐度、内能误差和LeBlanc过冲消除方面表现更优
AI.conclusion: 该方法能以极低成本（<0.25%）从标准激波捕捉计算中准确恢复亚网格波几何结构，显著提升接触间断分辨率，优于现有先进方法

title: On the performance of QTP functionals applied to second-order response properties II: Dynamic polarizability and long-range C$_6$ coefficients
summary: This work is the second in the series "On the performance of QTP functionals applied to second-order response properties." In the first paper (J. Chem. Phys. 162, 054105, 2025), we demonstrated the good performance of Quantum Theory Project functionals in predicting static perturbed second-order properties, such as static polarizabilities, nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) spin-spin coupling constants, and NMR chemical shifts. In the present study, we focus on frequency-dependent properties, namely dynamic polarizabilities and C$_6$ dispersion coefficients. For completeness, a total of 25 exchange-correlation (XC) functionals were investigated. Dynamic polarizabilities were evaluated at five different perturbation wavelengths: 632.99 nm, 594.10 nm, 543.52 nm, 514.50 nm, and 325.13 nm. This property was also computed using HF and EOM-CCSD. In general, EOM-CCSD results are very close to those obtained with linear-response CC3, except at the highest frequency. Among Kohn-Sham calculations, TPSS0 and QTP01 showed the best overall performance for dynamic polarizabilities. We also assessed how well QTP functionals reproduce the pole structure of the CO molecule. For the C$_6$ dispersion coefficients, calculations were performed using the Casimir-Polder equation. The best overall performance was obtained with O3LYP; however, the first eleven ranked functionals show very similar accuracy. Within the QTP family, QTP01 and LC-QTP provide the best results for C$_6$ coefficients.

AI.tldr: 该研究评估了25种交换相关泛函在预测频率依赖性质（动态极化率和C6色散系数）方面的性能，发现TPSS0和QTP01在动态极化率方面表现最佳，O3LYP在C6系数方面表现最好。
AI.motivation: 在第一篇论文证明了QTP泛函在静态二阶响应性质预测中的良好性能后，本研究旨在评估这些泛函在频率依赖性质（动态极化率和C6色散系数）方面的表现，以全面了解QTP泛函家族的性能。
AI.method: 研究了25种交换相关泛函，在五个不同波长（632.99 nm, 594.10 nm, 543.52 nm, 514.50 nm, 325.13 nm）下计算动态极化率，并与HF和EOM-CCSD方法比较。使用Casimir-Polder方程计算C6色散系数，并评估QTP泛函对CO分子极点结构的再现能力。
AI.result: EOM-CCSD结果与线性响应CC3非常接近（除最高频率外）。在Kohn-Sham计算中，TPSS0和QTP01在动态极化率方面表现最佳。对于C6色散系数，O3LYP表现最好，但前11种泛函准确度相似。在QTP家族中，QTP01和LC-QTP在C6系数方面表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: QTP泛函在频率依赖二阶响应性质预测中表现出良好性能，TPSS0和QTP01在动态极化率方面表现优异，而QTP01和LC-QTP在C6色散系数计算中表现最佳，为QTP泛函家族在响应性质计算中的应用提供了全面评估。

title: Unified gauge-theory description of quantum spin liquids on square-based frustrated lattices
summary: Quantum spin liquids are commonly thought to be highly sensitive to lattice geometry, symmetry, and microscopic exchange patterns, leading to a proliferation of seemingly distinct phases across frustrated magnets. Here, we provide a framework that unifies phases that appear distinct from the viewpoint of this intuition. We postulate that the spin-$\tfrac{1}{2}$ Heisenberg antiferromagnets on the square, Shastry-Sutherland, and checkerboard lattices can realize a single unified quantum phase: a gapless $\mathbb{Z}_2$ Dirac quantum spin liquid, despite their markedly different lattice symmetries. Using a systematic projective symmetry group analysis, we identify a checkerboard spin-liquid state that completes a closed set of adiabatically connected phases linking the well-established square-lattice and Shastry-Sutherland spin liquids. Crucially, we show that this lattice-level unification is mirrored exactly in the continuum description. In all three cases, the spin liquids descend from a common SU(2) $π$-flux parent state and are governed by the same gauge theory, QED$_3$ with two Dirac fermion flavors coupled to two adjoint Higgs fields. As a result, we postulate that the surrounding Néel and valence-bond-solid phases and their confinement transitions admit a unified interpretation within the framework of deconfined quantum criticality. More broadly, our results suggest that quantum spin liquids are most fundamentally classified not by lattice geometry or microscopic couplings, but by the emergent gauge theory and its Higgs structure. Distinct frustrated lattices can thus host the same quantum phase and exhibit the same confinement mechanisms, despite substantial differences in their microscopic symmetries.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一个统一框架，将不同晶格上的量子自旋液体视为同一相，挑战了传统上认为晶格几何和对称性决定相的观点。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为量子自旋液体对晶格几何、对称性和微观交换模式高度敏感，导致不同受挫磁体中存在大量看似不同的相。作者希望建立一个统一框架来连接这些看似不同的相。
AI.method: 采用投影对称群分析，识别出方格晶格上的自旋液体态，将已知的方格晶格和Shastry-Sutherland晶格自旋液体通过绝热连接联系起来。在连续描述中，这些自旋液体都源自共同的SU(2) π-通量母态，并由相同的规范理论描述。
AI.result: 证明方格晶格、Shastry-Sutherland晶格和方格棋盘晶格上的自旋-1/2海森堡反铁磁体可以实现统一的量子相：无能隙的Z₂狄拉克量子自旋液体，尽管它们的晶格对称性明显不同。
AI.conclusion: 量子自旋液体最根本的分类不是基于晶格几何或微观耦合，而是基于涌现的规范理论及其希格斯结构。不同的受挫晶格可以承载相同的量子相，表现出相同的禁闭机制，尽管它们的微观对称性存在显著差异。

title: Synthesis and Transfer of Freestanding Strain-Engineered Vertically Aligned Nanocomposite Thin Films
summary: The recent development of freestanding oxide thin films opens up exciting opportunities for the design of novel heterostructures with enhanced functionalities. Here, we explore the fabrication of membranes consisting of dense arrays of ultrathin CoxNi1-x nanowires epitaxially embedded in a SrTiO3 matrix. Through combined x-ray absorption spectroscopy, x-ray resonant magnetic scattering, x-ray diffraction and magnetooptical experiments, we show how a SrVO3-mediated lift-off process can be used to create and transfer these membranes while simultaneously preserving the structural and chemical integrity of the self-assembled, metallic CoxNi1-x nanopillars. With this approach, the large axial deformation of the embedded nanostructures is kept intact and, as a direct consequence, the magnetic properties of the nano-composite thin films remain largely unaltered after substrate removal. Our findings thus highlight a novel route for the synthesis of freestanding, strain-engineered vertically aligned heterostructures and pave the way for their future integration into spintronic and optomagnetic devices.

AI.tldr: 开发了一种制备自支撑氧化物薄膜的新方法，通过SrVO3介导的剥离工艺，成功制备了包含CoₓNi₁₋ₓ纳米线阵列的SrTiO₃基薄膜，并保持了纳米结构的应变状态和磁性能。
AI.motivation: 自支撑氧化物薄膜的发展为设计具有增强功能的新型异质结构提供了机会。研究旨在探索如何制备包含金属纳米线的氧化物薄膜，并在剥离过程中保持其结构和化学完整性。
AI.method: 采用SrVO3介导的剥离工艺，制备包含超薄CoₓNi₁₋ₓ纳米线阵列的SrTiO₃基薄膜。通过X射线吸收光谱、X射线共振磁散射、X射线衍射和磁光实验等多种表征手段验证结构完整性。
AI.result: 成功制备了自支撑薄膜，在去除衬底后，嵌入的纳米结构的大轴向变形得以保持，纳米复合薄膜的磁性能基本保持不变，证明了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为合成自支撑、应变工程的垂直排列异质结构开辟了新途径，为未来在自旋电子学和光磁器件中的集成应用奠定了基础。

title: Casimir versus Helmholtz forces in the Gaussian model: exact results for Dirichlet--Dirichlet, Neumann--Dirichlet, Neumann--Neumann, and periodic boundary conditions
summary: We present results and compare the behavior of two fluctuation-induced forces pertinent for their corresponding ensembles: the critical Casimir force in the grand canonical (fixed external field $h$) one and the critical Helmholtz force in the canonical (fixed average value of the order parameter $m$) one. We do so by deriving exact results for their behavior near the bulk critical point at $T=T_c$ in the three-dimensional Gaussian model. We consider Dirichlet-Dirichlet, Neumann-Dirichlet, Neumann-Neumann, and periodic boundary conditions. For every boundary condition examined, we confirm that both forces follow a finite-size scaling. We find that for Dirichlet-Dirichlet and Neumann-Dirichlet boundary conditions the Casimir and the Helmholtz force differ from each other. For Dirichlet-Dirichlet boundary conditions the Casimir force is always attractive, while the Helmholtz force can be both attractive and repulsive as a function of $T$ and $m$. For Neumann-Dirichlet boundary conditions the Casimir force changes sign from repulsive to attractive with increase of $h$, while the Helmholtz force stays always repulsive. Under periodic and Neumann-Neumann boundary conditions the Casimir force and the Helmholtz force coincide - the first does not depend on $h$, while the latter does not depend on $m$; they are always attractive.

AI.tldr: 在三维高斯模型中，比较了临界卡西米尔力（大正则系综）和临界亥姆霍兹力（正则系综）在四种边界条件下的行为差异
AI.motivation: 研究不同系综（大正则系综与正则系综）中波动诱导力的行为差异，特别是在临界点附近，理解边界条件对这两种力的影响
AI.method: 使用三维高斯模型，在临界点T=T_c附近推导精确结果，考虑四种边界条件：Dirichlet-Dirichlet、Neumann-Dirichlet、Neumann-Neumann和周期性边界条件
AI.result:
1. 所有边界条件下两种力都遵循有限尺寸标度行为
2. Dirichlet-Dirichlet边界：卡西米尔力总是吸引，亥姆霍兹力可吸引也可排斥（取决于T和m）
3. Neumann-Dirichlet边界：卡西米尔力随h增加从排斥变为吸引，亥姆霍兹力总是排斥
4. 周期性和Neumann-Neumann边界：两种力完全一致（卡西米尔力不依赖h，亥姆霍兹力不依赖m），总是吸引
AI.conclusion: 系综选择对波动诱导力的行为有重要影响，特别是在某些边界条件下，卡西米尔力和亥姆霍兹力表现出显著不同的特性，这为理解临界现象中的有限尺寸效应提供了新见解

title: Influence of sulphur vacancies on ultrafast charge separation in WS$_2$-graphene heterostructures
summary: Understanding how defects influence charge separation in WS$_2$-graphene heterostructures is crucial for future applications in light harvesting and detection. Previous studies have reported widely varying lifetimes for the charge-separated state, all supposedly linked to electron trapping at sulphur vacancies. The exact impact of these defects, however, has remained unclear. Here, we deliberately introduce sulphur vacancies by annealing the heterostructures at high temperatures in ultrahigh vacuum. Angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (ARPES) reveals that these vacancies modify both the band alignment and doping level of the heterostructure. Time-resolved ARPES (trARPES) further shows that increasing the sulphur vacancy concentration prolongs the lifetime of electrons in the WS$_2$ conduction band but shortens the lifetime of the charge-separated state. Guided by model calculations, we attribute this behaviour to shifts in the energy alignment between sulphur vacancy states and graphene's Dirac point, combined with a reduced excitonic absorption. The model also yields a transfer time for electrons tunneling from sulphur vacancies into graphene's Dirac cone of $\sim$4ps, consistent with our trARPES measurements. Our study clarifies the role of sulphur vacancies in WS$_2$-graphene heterostructures, further improving our microscopic understanding of charge dynamics for future optoelectronic applications.

AI.tldr: 硫空位缺陷通过改变能带对齐和掺杂水平影响WS₂-石墨烯异质结中的电荷分离寿命，增加硫空位浓度延长WS₂导带电子寿命但缩短电荷分离态寿命。
AI.motivation: 理解缺陷如何影响WS₂-石墨烯异质结中的电荷分离对光收集和检测应用至关重要。先前研究报道了电荷分离态寿命的广泛变化，都归因于硫空位的电子捕获，但缺陷的确切影响仍不清楚。
AI.method: 通过超高真空高温退火在异质结中故意引入硫空位缺陷，使用角分辨光电子能谱(ARPES)研究能带对齐和掺杂水平变化，结合时间分辨ARPES(trARPES)测量电荷动力学，并通过模型计算解释实验结果。
AI.result: 硫空位改变了异质结的能带对齐和掺杂水平；增加硫空位浓度延长了WS₂导带中电子的寿命，但缩短了电荷分离态的寿命；模型计算得出电子从硫空位态隧穿到石墨烯狄拉克锥的转移时间约为4ps，与trARPES测量一致。
AI.conclusion: 该研究阐明了硫空位在WS₂-石墨烯异质结中的作用，通过揭示硫空位态与石墨烯狄拉克点能量对齐变化以及激子吸收减少的机制，提高了对电荷动力学的微观理解，为未来光电器件应用提供了重要见解。

title: Quantum Brownian Motion: proving that the Schmid transition belongs to the Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless universality class
summary: We investigate the equilibrium properties of a quantum Brownian particle moving in a periodic potential, specifically addressing the nature of the dissipation-driven Schmid transition in the Ohmic regime. By employing World-Line Monte Carlo in the path-integral formalism and introducing a specific binary order parameter, we demonstrate that the transition belongs to the Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless universality class. This classification is substantiated through finite-size scaling analysis that reveals the characteristic logarithmic decay of the correlation functions associated with the order parameter at the critical point. Quantum phase transition turns out to be extremely fragile: it disappears in both over- and sub-Ohmic dissipation regimes. Crucially, we find that the presence of the periodic potential does not alter the localization properties in the sub-Ohmic and super-Ohmic regimes, where the system exhibits the same qualitative behavior as the free quantum Brownian particle. These findings highlight that the emergence of critical behavior is strictly governed by the low-frequency form of the environmental spectral function, which determines the long-range temporal decay of the dissipative kernel.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过世界线蒙特卡洛方法证明，在欧姆耗散区域中，量子布朗粒子在周期势中的Schmid相变属于BKT普适类，但该相变在超欧姆和亚欧姆区域消失。
AI.motivation: 研究量子布朗粒子在周期势中的平衡性质，特别是欧姆区域中耗散驱动的Schmid相变的本质，理解量子相变如何受耗散环境影响。
AI.method: 采用路径积分形式的世界线蒙特卡洛方法，引入特定的二元序参量，通过有限尺寸标度分析研究相关函数的对数衰减行为。
AI.result: 相变属于Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless普适类，在临界点序参量相关函数呈现特征性对数衰减。该量子相变极其脆弱，在超欧姆和亚欧姆耗散区域均消失。
AI.conclusion: 临界行为的出现严格由环境谱函数的低频形式决定，它控制着耗散核的长程时间衰减。周期势在亚欧姆和超欧姆区域不改变局域化性质。

title: Transfer Learning Meets Embedded Correlated Wavefunction Theory for Chemically Accurate Molecular Simulations: Application to Calcium Carbonate Ion-Pairing
comment: Submitted to Journal of Chemical Theory and Computation on March 3, 2026
summary: Achieving chemical accuracy for molecular simulations remains a central challenge in computational chemistry. Here, we present an embedded correlated wavefunction transfer learning (ECW-TL) framework for accurately simulating molecular dynamics in the condensed phase. ECW-TL incorporates high-level electron exchange and correlation effects in ECW theory while preserving training and computational efficiency of machine learned interatomic potentials. We demonstrate the framework on Ca2+-CO32- ion pairing in aqueous solution, a key process underlying CO2 mineralization in seawater. As proof of principle, we first show that finetuning a DFT-revPBE-D3(BJ) baseline model with embedded-DFT-SCAN data reproduces the DFT-SCAN free-energy surface within 1 kcal/mol across all solvation states. Extending the framework to embedded MP2 and localized natural-orbital CCSD(T) further refines the free-energy profile, revealing the crucial role of exact electron exchange and correlation in determining ion-pair stability and structure. ECW-TL thus provides a general, data-efficient route for transferring CW accuracy to large-scale simulations of complex aqueous and interfacial chemical processes.

AI.tldr: ECW-TL框架通过嵌入相关波函数和迁移学习，将高精度量子化学方法扩展到凝聚相分子动力学模拟，在保持计算效率的同时实现化学精度。
AI.motivation: 分子模拟要达到化学精度在计算化学中是一个核心挑战，特别是在凝聚相中准确模拟分子动力学需要平衡精度和计算效率。
AI.method: 提出嵌入相关波函数迁移学习框架，结合ECW理论的高精度电子交换相关效应与机器学习原子间势的训练和计算效率，通过微调DFT基线模型并扩展到MP2和CCSD(T)方法。
AI.result: 在Ca2+-CO32-水溶液离子配对系统中，微调后的模型在1 kcal/mol误差内重现DFT-SCAN自由能面，扩展到MP2和CCSD(T)进一步精炼自由能剖面，揭示了精确电子交换和相关在决定离子对稳定性和结构中的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: ECW-TL为将相关波函数精度高效转移到复杂水溶液和界面化学过程的大规模模拟提供了一条通用、数据高效的途径。

title: Hubbard model at U=$\infty$: Role of single and two-boson fluctuations
summary: We have developed a semi-analytical framework formulated in the canonical fermion representation to investigate strongly correlated electron systems. We consider the U=$\infty$ Hubbard model and used the equation of motion method to calculate the fermion self-energy which has two parts: single and two-boson exchange processes. The emergent bosons here are self-generated local charge and spin-density fluctuations which become strongly time-dependent due to extreme correlations. The computed boson spectral density is a diffusive damped mode with a long tail. The electron self-energy at $d=\infty$ is computed self-consistently. The corresponding fermionic spectral density displays a pronounced coherence peak at $ω=0$, while its frequency derivative develops a two-peak structure at finite $ω$. The resistivity shows a linear temperature dependence over a broad range, crossing over to coherent Fermi-liquid behavior at extremely low temperatures.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个基于正则费米子表示的半解析框架来研究强关联电子系统，采用U=∞哈伯德模型，通过运动方程方法计算费米子自能，发现电阻在宽温区呈线性温度依赖，极低温下过渡到相干费米液体行为。
AI.motivation: 研究强关联电子系统中的极端关联效应，特别是U=∞哈伯德模型中的电子输运性质和非费米液体行为。
AI.method: 采用正则费米子表示的半解析框架，使用运动方程方法计算费米子自能，自能包含单玻色子和双玻色子交换过程，其中玻色子为自生的局域电荷和自旋密度涨落。
AI.result: 计算得到的玻色子谱密度为扩散阻尼模式并具有长尾；电子自能在d=∞下自洽计算；费米子谱密度在ω=0处显示明显的相干峰，其频率导数在有限ω处呈现双峰结构；电阻在宽温区呈线性温度依赖，极低温下过渡到相干费米液体行为。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功描述了强关联电子系统中的非费米液体行为和线性电阻现象，揭示了极端关联下自生玻色子涨落的重要作用，为理解高温超导等强关联系统提供了新视角。

title: Assessing the suitability of the Thomas-Fermi-von Weizsäcker density functional for itinerant magnetism
summary: We assess the ability of the Thomas--Fermi--von Weizsacker (TFW) functional within orbital-free density functional theory (DFT) to describe itinerant magnetism. Magnetic stability is evaluated through the susceptibility obtained from the second derivative of the total energy with respect to the net magnetization. Calculations are performed for the paramagnetic metals Al and Pd and the canonical ferromagnets Fe, Co, and Ni, with the results benchmarked against Kohn--Sham DFT. The orbital-free results show poor agreement with the Kohn--Sham predictions, failing to capture even the qualitative trends. Using the orbital-free ground-state density with the Kohn--Sham functional in a non-self-consistent calculation yields reasonable qualitative agreement, although the quantitative agreement remains limited. These results highlight fundamental limitations of the TFW functional for describing itinerant magnetism.

AI.tldr: TFW泛函在轨道自由密度泛函理论中描述巡游磁性的能力评估，结果显示与Kohn-Sham DFT相比定性定量均不匹配，揭示了TFW泛函的基本局限性。
AI.motivation: 评估轨道自由密度泛函理论中的Thomas-Fermi-von Weizsacker (TFW)泛函描述巡游磁性的能力，探索其在磁性材料研究中的适用性。
AI.method: 通过总能量对净磁化强度的二阶导数计算磁化率来评估磁性稳定性。对顺磁金属Al、Pd和典型铁磁体Fe、Co、Ni进行计算，并以Kohn-Sham DFT作为基准。
AI.result: 轨道自由结果与Kohn-Sham预测一致性差，甚至无法捕捉定性趋势。使用轨道自由基态密度进行非自洽Kohn-Sham计算可获得合理的定性一致，但定量一致性仍然有限。
AI.conclusion: TFW泛函在描述巡游磁性方面存在基本局限性，无法准确预测磁性材料的磁稳定性。

title: Population Annealing as a Discrete-Time Schrödinger Bridge
summary: We present a theoretical framework that reinterprets Population Annealing (PA) through the lens of the discrete-time Schrödinger Bridge (SB) problem. We demonstrate that the heuristic reweighting step in PA is derived by analytically solving the Schrödinger system without iterative computation via instantaneous projection. In addition, we identify the thermodynamic work as the optimal control potential that solves the global variational problem on path space. This perspective unifies non-equilibrium thermodynamics with the geometric framework of optimal transport, interpreting the Jarzynski equality as a consistency condition within the Donsker-Varadhan variational principle, and elucidates the thermodynamic optimality of PA.

AI.tldr: 论文提出理论框架，将群体退火重新解释为离散时间薛定谔桥问题，证明PA的重新加权步骤可通过瞬时投影解析求解薛定谔系统，并将热力学功识别为路径空间上的最优控制势。
AI.motivation: 建立群体退火（PA）与薛定谔桥（SB）问题之间的理论联系，从最优传输的几何框架重新解释非平衡热力学，为PA算法提供理论基础和热力学最优性证明。
AI.method: 通过离散时间薛定谔桥理论框架重新解释PA，证明PA的启发式重新加权步骤可通过瞬时投影解析求解薛定谔系统，无需迭代计算。将热力学功识别为路径空间全局变分问题的最优控制势。
AI.result: 建立了PA与SB问题的理论等价性，证明Jarzynski等式是Donsker-Varadhan变分原理中的一致性条件，阐明了PA的热力学最优性，统一了非平衡热力学与最优传输的几何框架。
AI.conclusion: 该理论框架为群体退火算法提供了坚实的理论基础，将非平衡热力学与最优传输几何框架统一起来，阐明了PA的热力学最优性，并为理解Jarzynski等式提供了新的视角。

title: Observation of a Reconstructed Chern Insulator in Twisted Bilayer MoTe2
summary: Twisted bilayer MoTe2 is a prototypical moire material in which long-wavelength superlattices amplify electron correlations, enabling a wealth of emergent quantum phases. To date, experimental efforts have focused primarily on small twist angles (typically smaller than 4deg ), whereas the larger-angle regime-where moire bands become more dispersive and correlations are reduced-has remained largely unexplored. Here we chart the topological phase space of tMoTe2 at a relatively large twist angle of approximately 4.54deg, accessing a moderately correlated regime with enhanced bandwidth. In contrast to small-angle devices that predominantly host fractional quantum anomalous Hall or spin Hall responses, we uncover multiple Chern-insulating states with C = 1 at moire fillings v = -1, -0.53 and -1/2. Strikingly, at v = -2/3 a magnetic field induces a fractional Chern insulator accompanied by an insulator-metal transition. Our results broaden the topological phase diagram of tMoTe2 and establish large-angle moire superlattices as a versatile platform for engineering robust topological states beyond the strong-correlation limit.

AI.tldr: 在较大扭转角（~4.54°）的MoTe₂双层结构中发现了多个陈绝缘态和分数陈绝缘体，扩展了该材料的拓扑相图
AI.motivation: 之前的研究主要集中在扭转角小于4°的小角度区域，而大角度区域（莫尔能带更分散、关联性减弱）尚未充分探索。本研究旨在探索较大扭转角下MoTe₂的拓扑相空间
AI.method: 使用扭转角约为4.54°的MoTe₂双层结构，进入带宽增强的中等关联区域，通过实验测量不同莫尔填充下的拓扑响应
AI.result: 在v = -1, -0.53和-1/2处发现了多个C=1的陈绝缘态；在v = -2/3处，磁场诱导产生了分数陈绝缘体并伴随绝缘体-金属转变
AI.conclusion: 研究扩展了tMoTe₂的拓扑相图，确立了大角度莫尔超晶格作为工程化强关联极限之外稳健拓扑态的多功能平台

title: Majorana Crystal in Rhombohedral Graphene
summary: Recent experiments in rhombohedral graphene report an unusual superconducting phase emerging from a spin- and valley-polarized quarter-metal state. The prevailing interpretation invokes chiral topological superconductivity, but the role of the `Fulde-Ferrell' phase factor due to intra-valley pairing has remained largely unexplored. Here we show, via a gauge transformation, that this phase is equivalent to an ordinary chiral topological superconductor on the triangular lattice, while simultaneously forming an extraordinary Majorana crystal on the dual honeycomb lattice reminiscent of the Haldane model.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过规范变换证明，菱面体石墨烯中的超导相等价于三角晶格上的普通手性拓扑超导体，同时在双蜂巢晶格上形成类似Haldane模型的非凡马约拉纳晶体。
AI.motivation: 菱面体石墨烯实验中发现从自旋和谷极化的四分之一金属态出现的不寻常超导相，现有解释主要关注手性拓扑超导性，但忽略了"Fulde-Ferrell"相位因子在谷内配对中的作用。
AI.method: 通过规范变换方法，将菱面体石墨烯中的超导相重新解释，分析其在三角晶格和双蜂巢晶格上的等价表现形式。
AI.result: 证明该超导相等价于三角晶格上的普通手性拓扑超导体，同时在双蜂巢晶格上形成类似Haldane模型的马约拉纳晶体结构。
AI.conclusion: 菱面体石墨烯中的超导相具有双重性质：既是三角晶格上的手性拓扑超导体，又形成蜂巢晶格上的马约拉纳晶体，为理解这类非常规超导提供了新视角。

title: Velocity Gauge for Oscillator Strength in $Δ$SCF theory
summary: Delta self-consistent-field ($Δ$SCF) theory is widely used for electronic excitation energy calculations. However, calculating the corresponding oscillator strengths is challenging. The corresponding many-electron wavefunctions are not directly accessible. Both the ground-state and the excited-state wave functions from $Δ$SCF are described by reference Kohn-Sham (KS) single-determinant wavefunctions for the fictitious non-interacting systems. The non-orthogonality between the ground and excited Kohn-Sham determinants from two different SCF calculations leads to unphysically origin-dependent transition properties, such as transition dipole moment and length-gauge oscillator strength. Including nuclei contribution in the perturbation is theoretically rigorous, but its effectiveness is only limited to neutral systems, as we show theoretically and numerically. While several other practical approaches have been proposed to tackle the non-orthogonality problem and yield reasonable results, inevitably the determinant of the ground state or the excited state is changed, as well as the density matrix. In this work, we explore the use of the velocity gauge to compute oscillator strength within $Δ$SCF theory. We demonstrate that the velocity gauge is capable of naturally accounting for the non-orthogonality of $Δ$SCF KS wavefunctions and offering origin-independent predictions without any additional correction schemes to the KS wavefunctions. Compared to the length-gauge results obtained via symmetric orthogonalization, velocity gauge can offer comparable results. Furthermore, the adoption of spin-purified singlet excitation energy in the velocity-gauge transition dipole moment significantly enhances the overall performance of the velocity gauge for $Δ$SCF oscillator strength predictions on conjugated chromophores.

AI.tldr: ΔSCF理论计算激发能时，激发态振子强度计算面临挑战。本文探索使用速度规范计算ΔSCF振子强度，能自然处理KS波函数非正交性问题，提供原点无关的预测。
AI.motivation: ΔSCF理论广泛用于电子激发能计算，但计算相应振子强度存在挑战。基态和激发态KS波函数来自不同SCF计算，其非正交性导致过渡性质（如跃迁偶极矩和长度规范振子强度）出现不合理的原点依赖性。现有方法需要改变基态或激发态行列式，本文探索更自然的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用速度规范计算ΔSCF振子强度。速度规范能自然处理ΔSCF KS波函数的非正交性问题，无需对KS波函数进行额外修正。同时采用自旋纯化的单重态激发能来增强速度规范跃迁偶极矩的计算性能。
AI.result: 速度规范能够自然处理ΔSCF KS波函数的非正交性，提供原点无关的预测。与通过对称正交化获得的长度规范结果相比，速度规范能提供可比的结果。在共轭发色团上，采用自旋纯化单重态激发能的速度规范跃迁偶极矩显著提升了ΔSCF振子强度预测的整体性能。
AI.conclusion: 速度规范为ΔSCF理论中的振子强度计算提供了有效解决方案，能自然处理非正交性问题，避免原点依赖性，且无需修改KS波函数。结合自旋纯化技术可进一步提升对共轭发色团的预测性能。

title: Magnetic Imaging of Macroscopic Spin Chirality Flipping
summary: Chirality is a fundamental organizing principle of correlated and topological states. In quantum magnets, chirality arises from the geometric twisting of spins and serves as an emergent source of Berry curvature and quantum metrics. Although external fields can reversibly tune the spin chirality, understanding how spontaneous reversal occurs on macroscopic length scale remains an unresolved challenge. In this letter, we use resonant magnetic x-ray scattering with 2.5-micron spatial resolution to image intertwined spin, charge, and lattice orders of the correlated topological magnet EuAl4. We uncover a macroscopic chirality flipping transition and a remarkable chiral memory effect. The chiral magnetic domain tracks the landscape of the underlying charge density wave, implicating emergent chiral magnetic interactions arising from competing chiral and nematic lattice fields. Our results reveal the fundamental significance of magnetoelastic coupling in stabilizing homochiral and topological magnetic states.

AI.tldr: 该研究利用高空间分辨率X射线散射成像技术，在拓扑磁体EuAl4中发现了宏观手性翻转相变和手性记忆效应，揭示了磁弹耦合在稳定同手性和拓扑磁态中的关键作用。
AI.motivation: 手性是相关和拓扑态的基本组织原理，但在量子磁体中，理解自发手性翻转如何在宏观尺度上发生仍是一个未解决的挑战。
AI.method: 使用2.5微米空间分辨率的共振磁性X射线散射技术，对相关拓扑磁体EuAl4的交织自旋、电荷和晶格序进行成像。
AI.result: 发现了宏观手性翻转相变和显著的手性记忆效应，手性磁畴跟踪底层电荷密度波的分布，表明竞争的手性和向列晶格场产生了涌现的手性磁相互作用。
AI.conclusion: 磁弹耦合在稳定同手性和拓扑磁态中具有根本重要性，为理解宏观手性翻转机制提供了新见解。

title: Tuning the optoelectronic properties of graphene quantum dots by BN-ring doping: A density functional theory study
comment: 35 pages and 9 figures (Manuscript), 10 pages and 6 figures (Supplemental Material)
summary: Graphene monolayer is a material with zero band gap, because of which its applications in optoelectronics are limited. The question arises, can we modify the optoelectronic properties of graphene by doping it with other atoms? Synthesis of 2D monolayer of graphene doped with hetero-atoms such as boron and nitrogen, and a few computational studies of their structural and electronic properties were previously reported. In this work, we aim to answer this question for graphene quantum dots (GQDs) by replacing their carbon rings with $(BN)_3$ (borazine) hexagonal rings. We have studied in detail the geometry, electronic structure, and optical absorption spectra of fourteen different borazine-ring doped diamond-shaped GQDs using first-principles density functional theory (DFT). These BN-GQDs differ in the location, orientation, and the number of borazine rings. We computed their optical absorption spectra using time-dependent DFT (TDDFT) and examined: (a) for single-ring doped BN-GQDs the influence of ring location on optical properties, and (b) for double-ring doped systems, the influence of location, mutual distance and orientation of the rings on their absorption spectra. Frontier molecular orbitals are studied in detail to understand the nature of low-lying optical excitations. We also performed a group-theoretic analysis of the influence of their reduced symmetries on their optical properties. Our results indicate that BN-ring doping can achieve significant control over the optical properties of GQDs. The comparison of the optical absorption spectra of the BN-GQDs with the parent GQD shows remarkable spectral broadening with optical gap spanning over infrared to visible region. Thus, systematic BN-ring doping provides easy tunability of the electronic and optical properties of BN-GQDs, which is very promising for optoelectronic applications.

AI.tldr: 通过硼氮环掺杂调控石墨烯量子点的光电性质，实现从红外到可见光区的光谱展宽
AI.motivation: 石墨烯单层零带隙限制了其在光电子学中的应用，需要探索通过掺杂异质原子来调控其光电性质的可能性
AI.method: 采用第一性原理密度泛函理论(DFT)和含时密度泛函理论(TDDFT)，研究14种不同硼氮环掺杂的石墨烯量子点，分析环的位置、取向和数量对几何结构、电子结构和光学吸收谱的影响
AI.result: 硼氮环掺杂能显著调控石墨烯量子点的光学性质，与原始石墨烯量子点相比，光学吸收谱显著展宽，光学带隙覆盖红外到可见光区域
AI.conclusion: 系统性的硼氮环掺杂为BN-GQDs的电子和光学性质提供了易于调控的方法，在光电子应用中具有广阔前景

title: Conditional Ergodicity and Universal Fluctuations in Weak Ergodicity Breaking
summary: Time averages extracted from single-particle trajectories in complex media often vary strongly from one trajectory to another, even for long measurement times. Such persistent trajectory-to trajectory scatter is commonly observed in anomalous diffusion and signals weak ergodicity breaking driven by scale-free trapping. Here we identify conditional ergodicity: conditioning on a natural internal clock restores self-averaging of time-averaged observables. Combining conditional ergodicity with the stochastic mapping between the internal clock and physical time implies a universal law: once rescaled by their mean, time-averaged transport coefficients in systems exhibiting weak ergodicity breaking follow the Mittag-Leffler distribution. We demonstrate this universality across multiple models of disordered media displaying anomalous diffusion.

AI.tldr: 在弱遍历破缺系统中，通过条件化内部时钟，时间平均输运系数遵循Mittag-Leffler分布
AI.motivation: 在复杂介质中，单粒子轨迹的时间平均表现出强烈的轨迹间差异，即使在长时间测量下也是如此。这种持续的轨迹间散射在反常扩散中常见，表明存在由无标度捕获驱动的弱遍历破缺。研究如何在这种系统中恢复自平均性。
AI.method: 提出条件遍历性概念：通过对自然内部时钟进行条件化，可以恢复时间平均可观测量（如时间平均输运系数）的自平均性。结合内部时钟与物理时间之间的随机映射，推导出普适规律。
AI.result: 证明了一个普适定律：在表现出弱遍历破缺的系统中，一旦通过其均值进行重新标度，时间平均输运系数遵循Mittag-Leffler分布。该结果在多个显示反常扩散的无序介质模型中得到验证。
AI.conclusion: 条件遍历性为弱遍历破缺系统中的统计描述提供了新框架，Mittag-Leffler分布成为此类系统中时间平均输运系数的普适分布，有助于理解反常扩散的统计特性。

title: Twist-angle evolution from valley-polarized fractional topological phases to valley-degenerate superconductivity in twisted bilayer MoTe2
summary: Moiré superlattices formed by semiconducting transition metal dichalcogenides (TMDs) provide a highly tunable platform for investigating strongly correlated and topological quantum phases. As a prototypical example, twisted bilayer MoTe2 (tMoTe2) has been shown to host fractional topological phases, such as zero-field fractional Chern insulators (FCIs) exhibiting fractional quantum anomalous Hall (FQAH) effects. However, how these correlated topological phases evolve with twist angle and compete with other quantum phases in tMoTe2 remains largely unexplored. Here we report a systematic transport study of twist-angle-dependent phase diagrams in tMoTe2 across a range of 3.8°-5.78°, revealing an evolution from fractionalized states of matter with spontaneous valley polarization to valley-degenerate superconductivity. At relatively small twist angles, partially-filled Chern bands of tMoTe2 host FQAH states following the Jain sequence, together with signatures of an anomalous composite Fermi liquid at moiré hole filling factor νh = 1/2. Increasing twist angle progressively suppresses fractional topological phases and reconstructs the half-filled Chern band into symmetry-breaking integer Chern insulating states. At νh = 1, we observe a transition from robust integer quantum anomalous Hall (IQAH) insulators at small angles to displacement-field-tuned, topologically trivial correlated insulators at larger angles. Remarkably, at a twist angle of 5.78°, superconductivity emerges adjacent to the correlated insulating phase, with a phase diagram closely resembling that recently reported in twisted bilayer WSe2 (tWSe2). Our results uncover a unified twist-angle-driven phase evolution linking fractional topology, symmetry breaking, magnetic order, and superconductivity, providing new insight into the emergent quantum phenomena in moiré systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文系统研究了扭曲双层MoTe2在不同扭转角度（3.8°-5.78°）下的相图演化，揭示了从分数拓扑相到超导相的转变规律。
AI.motivation: 虽然扭曲双层MoTe2已被证明能承载分数拓扑相，但这些相关拓扑相如何随扭转角度演化，以及它们与其他量子相（如超导）的竞争关系尚不清楚。
AI.method: 通过系统的输运研究，测量了不同扭转角度（3.8°-5.78°）下扭曲双层MoTe2的相图演化，包括分数陈绝缘体、整数陈绝缘体和超导相等。
AI.result: 1. 小角度时观察到遵循Jain序列的分数量子反常霍尔态和反常复合费米液体；2. 增大角度会抑制分数拓扑相，重构为对称破缺的整数陈绝缘态；3. 在5.78°时观察到与相关绝缘相相邻的超导性，相图与扭曲双层WSe2相似。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了扭转角度驱动的统一相演化，连接了分数拓扑、对称破缺、磁序和超导性，为理解莫尔系统中的涌现量子现象提供了新见解。

title: Free complement method with Gaussian expanded complements: hierarchical decontraction to mitigate the exponential wall before selection
summary: The previous work (arXiv:2508.04635 [physics.chem-ph]) of the free complement (FC) method with Gaussian expanded complement functions adopts the Slater initial wavefunction. This may introduce an exponential complexity of the variational coefficients associated to the Gaussian complement functions with respect to the number of electrons at a given order before the overlap matrix based selection, for more than one Gaussian function used in the expansion. The present work uses decontractions via the distinct exponents introduced by the $g$ functions to avoid this scenario at low order of the FC method. The exponential number of the variational parameters is postponed to higher orders of the FC expansion.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过使用g函数引入的不同指数进行去收缩，避免自由补方法在低阶时因高斯展开导致的变分参数指数增长问题。
AI.motivation: 先前工作使用高斯展开的补函数和Slater初始波函数，当使用多个高斯函数展开时，在重叠矩阵选择前，变分系数会随电子数呈指数增长。这限制了方法的可扩展性。
AI.method: 采用g函数引入的不同指数进行去收缩处理，在自由补方法的低阶阶段避免变分参数的指数爆炸，将指数增长问题推迟到更高阶的FC展开。
AI.result: 成功将变分参数的指数增长问题从低阶推迟到高阶，提高了自由补方法在低阶计算中的可扩展性和计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 通过去收缩技术有效解决了自由补方法中变分参数在低阶的指数增长问题，为处理多电子系统提供了更可行的计算方案。

title: Anomalous Thermal Transport Reveals Weak First-Order Melting of Charge Density Waves in 2H-TaSe2
summary: How ordered phases melt in low-dimensional quantum materials remain difficult to resolve because the relevant fluctuations are dynamic and charge neutral. In this work, we show that thermal transport provides a sensitive probe of these hidden fluctuations in the layered transition metal dichalcogenide 2H-TaSe2. We observe a striking V-shaped temperature dependence of the thermal conductivity that cannot be explained by conventional phonon-phonon scattering. Instead, it originates from scattering by persistent local charge-density-wave (CDW) correlations, consistent with our phenomenological model linking thermal transport to spatial CDW fluctuation. Electron diffraction reveals short-range periodic lattice distortions persisting to at least 300 K, while X-ray diffraction shows thermal hysteresis of the CDW wavevector. Together, these results reveal a dislocation- and fluctuation-driven weak first-order melting of the CDW state.

AI.tldr: 热导率测量揭示2H-TaSe2中电荷密度波(CDW)态的弱一级熔融机制，涉及位错和涨落驱动过程
AI.motivation: 研究低维量子材料中有序相的熔融机制具有挑战性，因为相关涨落是动态且电中性的，需要新的探测方法
AI.method: 通过热输运测量、电子衍射和X射线衍射研究2H-TaSe2，建立热导率与空间CDW涨落关联的现象学模型
AI.result: 观察到热导率的V形温度依赖性，电子衍射显示短程晶格畸变持续至300K，X射线衍射显示CDW波矢的热滞后现象
AI.conclusion: 2H-TaSe2中的CDW态通过位错和涨落驱动的弱一级熔融过程熔化，热输运是探测隐藏CDW涨落的灵敏探针

title: Mechanical Control of Polar Order
summary: BiFeO3 is a model multiferroic in which the ferroelectric polarization is coupled to ferroelastic lattice distortions, yet deterministic control of its domain structure remains limited by high switching fields and competing polarization variants. Here, we identify a mechanically assisted polarization switching pathway in epitaxial BiFeO3 thin films that fundamentally alters the switching energetics. Using just out-of-plane electric fields, polarization reversal requires voltages of approximately 4 V and stabilizes coexisting polarization states. In contrast, when mechanical pressure is applied concurrently, the coercive voltage can be significantly reduced (even to 0V), resulting in spontaneous switching. Piezoresponse force microscopy measurements reveal that applied mechanical pressure suppresses ferroelastic domain competition, indicating a decrease in the required electrical energy barrier associated with polarization rotation and domain wall motion. These results demonstrate that stress acts as an active thermodynamic control parameter, enabling access to switching pathways that are inaccessible under only an electric field. By directly coupling lattice distortions to polarization reversal, mechanically assisted switching provides a general framework for controlling coupled order parameters in multiferroic oxides, which can be directly applied in the device-level architecture, where a small mechanical pressure can help in achieving lower switching energy of ferroelectric polarization. This work advances the fundamental understanding of electromechanical coupling in complex ferroics and establishes mechanical energy as a powerful tool for probing and manipulating ferroelastic ferroelectric interactions.

AI.tldr: 在BiFeO3多铁薄膜中，机械压力与电场协同作用可显著降低铁电极化翻转的电压需求，甚至实现零电压自发翻转，为多铁氧化物器件提供低能耗开关新途径。
AI.motivation: BiFeO3作为典型多铁材料，其铁电极化与铁弹晶格畸变耦合，但高开关电压和竞争性极化变体限制了其畴结构的确定性控制。需要寻找降低开关能耗的新方法。
AI.method: 在BiFeO3外延薄膜中，同时施加面外电场和机械压力，通过压电力显微镜测量极化翻转行为，分析机械压力对铁弹畴竞争和极化旋转能垒的影响。
AI.result: 仅电场需要约4V电压且产生共存极化态；机械压力协同作用可将矫顽电压显著降低（甚至至0V），实现自发翻转。机械压力抑制铁弹畴竞争，降低极化旋转和畴壁运动所需电能垒。
AI.conclusion: 应力作为主动热力学控制参数，可开启电场单独无法实现的翻转路径。机械辅助开关为多铁氧化物耦合序参量控制提供通用框架，在器件层面实现低能耗极化翻转，推进复杂铁性材料机电耦合的基础理解。

title: Percolation and Criticality in Hyperuniform Networks
comment: To be submitted to Physical Review E
summary: Hyperuniform many-particle systems, which encompass crystals, quasicrystals and certain exotic disordered systems, exhibit an anomalous suppression of density fluctuations on macroscopic length scales relative to those of conventional disordered systems. Here we investigate the percolation behaviors of disordered stealthy hyperuniform systems (SHU), a subclass of hyperuniform configurations for which the structure factor vanishes for a finite range of wavevectors near the origin, with the degree of stealthiness controlled via a parameter $χ$. We construct Delaunay triangulation networks derived from SHU configurations with varying $χ$ as well as Poisson point configurations for the purpose of comparison. We investigate a non-uniform bond percolation process, in which bond occupation probabilities decrease with the Euclidean distance between the connected vertices. In this setting, percolation is induced by varying a tuning parameter $z$. We estimate the percolation thresholds $z_c$ and critical exponents of the networks via finite-size scaling and the Newman-Ziff algorithm. We find that SHU networks exhibit lower percolation thresholds than Poisson networks. Notably, the percolation threshold of SHU networks decreases with the stealthiness parameter $χ$, indicating that global connectivity emerges more readily as short-range order increases. Moreover, we show that SHU networks with large $χ$ belong to the same universality class as lattices, while Poisson and low-$χ$ systems show deviations. We relate the shift in critical exponents to the degree of suppression of density fluctuations in the point configurations. Our work extends previous studies on transport properties of SHU systems from continuum two-phase media to networks. These results open new avenues for optimizing the resilience of statistically homogeneous disordered networks.

AI.tldr: 研究无序隐身超均匀系统的渗流行为，发现随着隐身度参数χ增加，渗流阈值降低，高χ系统与晶格属于同一普适类
AI.motivation: 研究超均匀多粒子系统的渗流特性，特别是无序隐身超均匀系统，探索其与常规无序系统相比的异常密度涨落抑制如何影响网络连通性
AI.method: 构建不同χ值的SHU配置和泊松点配置的Delaunay三角网络，研究非均匀键渗流过程（键占据概率随顶点间欧氏距离减小），使用有限尺寸标度和Newman-Ziff算法估计渗流阈值和临界指数
AI.result: SHU网络的渗流阈值低于泊松网络，且随χ增加而降低；高χ的SHU系统与晶格属于同一普适类，而泊松和低χ系统则偏离；临界指数的变化与点配置中密度涨落的抑制程度相关
AI.conclusion: SHU系统随着短程有序增加，全局连通性更容易出现；研究将SHU系统的输运性质研究从连续两相介质扩展到网络，为优化统计均匀无序网络的韧性开辟了新途径

title: Electron Tesla valve
comment: 8 pages, 4 main figures and 1 supplementary figure
summary: In solids, frequent electron-electron collisions can induse collective, fluid-like electron transport. While this regime offers a powerful framework for exploring many-body phenomena, there is still a lack in functional electronic device actively exploting hydrodynamic behaviour of electrons. Here, we introduce a solid-state analogue of a Tesla valve $\unicode{x2013}$ a passive fluidic diode that rectifies flow without moving parts. Lithographically defined in high-mobility GaAs two-dimensional electron gas, the device exhibits abrupt rectification producing a more than tenfold difference between forward and reverse resistances. This threshold behaviour, reminiscent of the onset of turbulence in fluidic Tesla valves, points to the emergence of turbulent regime in the electron liquid $\unicode{x2013}$ a long-predicted, but yet unobserved state of electronic matter. More broadly, our work demonstrates the fruitfulness of the hydrodynamic analogy: fluidic technologies can be readily adopted to create novel electronic devices. Here, this is realized through a solid-state rectifier whose operation relies on a new physical mechanism, interparticle collisions.

AI.tldr: 该论文在GaAs二维电子气中实现了类似特斯拉阀的固态电子流体二极管，通过电子-电子碰撞产生的流体动力学行为实现了超过10倍的正反向电阻差异，首次观测到了电子液体中的湍流状态。
AI.motivation: 尽管电子-电子碰撞可以诱导集体流体状电子传输，为探索多体现象提供了强大框架，但目前仍缺乏积极利用电子流体动力学行为的功能性电子器件。
AI.method: 在高迁移率GaAs二维电子气中通过光刻技术制造固态特斯拉阀类似物——一种无移动部件的被动流体二极管，利用电子-电子碰撞产生的流体动力学行为实现整流功能。
AI.result: 器件表现出急剧的整流特性，正反向电阻差异超过10倍。这种阈值行为类似于流体特斯拉阀中湍流的起始，表明电子液体中出现了长期预测但尚未观测到的湍流状态。
AI.conclusion: 流体动力学类比具有丰硕的应用前景：流体技术可以轻松应用于创建新型电子器件。本研究通过固态整流器实现了这一目标，其工作机制依赖于粒子间碰撞这一新的物理机制。

title: Disentangling Single- and Biexciton Dynamics with Photoelectron-Detected Two-Dimensional Electronic Spectroscopy
comment: Main manuscript: 32 pages, 5 figures; Supplementary material: 15 pages, 6 figures, 1 table
summary: Action-detected two-dimensional (2D) spectroscopy resolves the time-dependent nonlinear optical response of a quantum system by recording incoherently detected observables such as fluorescence, photoelectrons, or photocurrents which reflect the system's excited-state population. Processes such as exciton-exciton annihilation alter this population and obscure, for instance, energy transfer processes. This limits the information available from action-detected 2D spectra compared to their coherently detected counterparts. Here we investigate time gating and kinetic-energy filtering in photoelectron-detected 2D spectroscopy to disentangle various processes. We implement a numerical simulation protocol that allows us to calculate photoelectron-detected 2D spectra for various systems, demonstrating that time gating can extract the same information as coherently detected 2D spectroscopy, even when annihilation is present. Furthermore, we can directly infer annihilation dynamics. Kinetic-energy filtering additionally enables the isolation of specific excited-state dynamics. Our simulations demonstrate that time gating and kinetic-energy filtering are promising extensions for photoelectron-detected 2D spectroscopy.

AI.tldr: 时间门控和动能滤波可提升光电子检测二维光谱的信息提取能力，解决激发态湮灭对能量转移过程的干扰问题
AI.motivation: 动作检测二维光谱通过非相干检测（荧光、光电子、光电流）反映激发态布居，但激子-激子湮灭等过程会改变布居并掩盖能量转移信息，限制了其与相干检测光谱相比的信息获取能力
AI.method: 提出数值模拟协议，计算光电子检测二维光谱，研究时间门控和动能滤波技术来分离不同过程。时间门控可提取与相干检测相同的信息，动能滤波可分离特定激发态动力学
AI.result: 时间门控能在存在湮灭的情况下提取与相干检测二维光谱相同的信息，并能直接推断湮灭动力学；动能滤波能分离特定激发态动力学
AI.conclusion: 时间门控和动能滤波是光电子检测二维光谱的有前景的扩展技术，能有效分离不同过程并提取更多信息

title: Theory of Magnetoacoustic Resonance to Probe Multipole Effects Due to a Crystal Field Quartet
summary: We present a new method of acoustically driven resonance that probes octupole degrees of freedom as well as a quadrupole usually hidden by the magnetic properties of a crystal field quartet. A characteristic of the quadrupole is reflected in the anisotropic resonance transition rate, which depends on the propagation direction of a surface acoustic wave under an external magnetic field parallel to a typical crystallographic axis. The transition rate is modulated by the anisotropic Zeeman splitting associated with octupoles. We demonstrate how to obtain information about the quartet quadrupole-strain coupling and evaluate the anisotropic octupole effect quantitatively. We also discuss the applicability of our method to identifying a quadrupole order parameter using a multipole-multipole interaction model. For large excitation energy gaps under strong magnetic fields, we propose a photon-assisted magnetoacoustic resonance formulated on the basis of the Floquet theory.

AI.tldr: 提出一种声学驱动共振新方法，用于探测晶体场四重态中的八极矩和通常被隐藏的四极矩自由度。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以探测晶体场四重态中的四极矩自由度，因为这些自由度通常被磁性性质所掩盖。需要开发新方法来探测这些隐藏的多极矩自由度，特别是八极矩和四极矩。
AI.method: 利用表面声波在平行于典型晶轴的外部磁场下传播，通过各向异性共振跃迁速率来探测四极矩特征。八极矩通过各向异性塞曼分裂来调制跃迁速率。还提出了基于Floquet理论的光子辅助磁声共振方法，用于强磁场下的大激发能隙情况。
AI.result: 该方法能够获取四重态四极矩-应变耦合信息，并定量评估各向异性八极矩效应。通过多极矩-多极矩相互作用模型，该方法还可用于识别四极矩序参数。
AI.conclusion: 提出的声学驱动共振方法为探测晶体场四重态中的隐藏多极矩自由度提供了有效手段，特别是在强磁场条件下，光子辅助磁声共振方法具有重要应用价值。

title: Descriptor-Based Classification of Interfacial Electronic Coupling in Janus XP3-Based 2D Heterostructures
summary: Understanding and controlling interfacial electronic coupling in two-dimensional (2D) heterostructures is essential for designing functional materials for electronic, optoelectronic, and catalytic applications. Here, we investigate vertical heterobilayers constructed from two distinct XP3 monolayers (X = As, Ge, Sb, Bi, Sn, Al, Ga, and Pb) using first-principles density functional theory.
